title: What Is AI Pair Programming? AI Coding Tools for Developers
summary: AI pair programming is an approach where AI assistants work alongside developers to enhance coding productivity, debugging, and code review processes. The technique transforms traditional development workflows by providing AI-driven support throughout the software development lifecycle.
writeup: This IBM Technology video explains AI pair programming, an approach in which AI assistants work alongside developers to support coding, debugging, and code review. It frames the technique as a shift in traditional development workflows, with AI-driven assistance applied across the software development lifecycle. Key concepts covered include natural language programming, code generation, and debugging.
